records.question: Which people are female candidates?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.people_id = candidate.people_id
WHERE people.sex = 'F'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT people.People_ID
FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.People_ID = candidate.People_ID
WHERE people.Sex = 'female'

records.question: Who are the men weighing at most 85.0 and standing no more than 197.0 tall?
records.gold_sql:

WHERE people.height <= 197.0 AND people.sex = 'M' AND people.weight <= 85.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT People_ID FROM people WHERE Sex = 'male' AND Weight <= 85.0 AND Height <= 197.0

WHERE people.height >= 195.0 AND people.sex = 'F'
records.pred_sql: SELECT People_ID FROM people WHERE Sex = 'female' AND Height >= 195.0

records.question: Which male individuals have a consider_rate of at most 0.27?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.people_id = candidate.people_id
WHERE candidate.consider_rate <= 0.27 AND people.sex = 'M'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT people.People_ID
FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.People_ID = candidate.People_ID
WHERE people.Sex = 'male' AND candidate.Consider_rate <= 0.27

records.question: Who was born on 28.09.1981 and has a candidate oppose rate exactly equal to 0.43?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.people_id = candidate.people_id
WHERE candidate.oppose_rate = 0.43 AND people.date_of_birth = '28.09.1981'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT people.People_ID
FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.People_ID = candidate.People_ID
WHERE people.Date_of_Birth = '28.09.1981' AND candidate.Oppose_rate = 0.43

records.question: Which people weigh at most 88.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
WHERE people.weight <= 88.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT People_ID FROM people WHERE Weight <= 88.0

records.question: Which men born on 06.10.1976 who are at least 188.0 cm tall and weigh at most 83.0 have a consider rate no more than 0.3 and an unsure rate no more than 0.2 in the WNBC/Marist Poll?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.people_id = candidate.people_id
WHERE candidate.unsure_rate <= 0.2 AND people.sex = 'M' AND candidate.poll_source = 'WNBC/Marist Poll' AND people.date_of_birth = '06.10.1976' AND candidate.consider_rate <= 0.3 AND people.height >= 188.0 AND people.weight <= 83.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT people.People_ID
FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.People_ID = candidate.People_ID
WHERE people.Sex = 'M'
  AND people.Date_of_Birth = '06.10.1976'
  AND people.Height >= 188.0
  AND people.Weight <= 83.0
  AND candidate.Poll_Source = 'WNBC/Marist Poll'
  AND candidate.Consider_rate <= 0.3
  AND candidate.Unsure_rate <= 0.2

records.question: Which people named Frantz Granvorka, born on 10.03.1976, are female and weigh at most 90.0 with a height no more than 195.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
WHERE people.sex = 'F' AND people.name = 'Frantz Granvorka' AND people.date_of_birth = '10.03.1976' AND people.weight <= 90.0 AND people.height <= 195.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT People_ID FROM people WHERE Name = 'Frantz Granvorka' AND Date_of_Birth = '10.03.1976' AND Sex = 'female' AND Weight <= 90.0 AND Height <= 195.0
